Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling And Issuance Of Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Be Made
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brian Rigonan, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: K & H Enterprises
Byron Sleck, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Lydia San Filippo

After hearing, Plaintiff/Judgment Creditor K & H Enterprises, INc.'s Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling And Issuance Of Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Be Made is GRANTED. Homeowner's exemption is granted sale within 60 days. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
